entities.name: 2024-2025 Labor Market
entities.context: Described as worst period for layoffs since 2008, possibly worse in raw numbers

entities.name: 2008 Financial Crisis
entities.context: Reference point for comparison to current layoff severity

entities.name: Hiring Stack
entities.context: The system of screening tools and processes employers use to filter candidates

entities.name: Screening Tools
entities.context: Automated filters widely used by employers that create low-signal noise

entities.name: Auto-Apply Behaviors
entities.context: Candidate pattern of mass-applying that floods systems with low-signal applications

entities.name: Differentiated Effort
entities.context: Carefully crafted resumes and thoughtful stories that go unrecognized by automated filters

entities.name: Resume Services
entities.context: Services jobseekers invest in but still experience low response rates

entities.name: Generic AI Tools
entities.context: AI tools candidates use that contribute to volume without differentiation

entities.name: Coaches
entities.context: Career coaching services candidates invest in during job search

entities.name: Emotional Exhaustion
entities.context: Common theme among candidates facing nihilistic job search process

relationships.context: Current layoffs compared to 2008 as worst since, possibly worse in raw numbers
Employers widely use screening tools as part of hiring infrastructure
Both contribute to flood of low-signal applications
Differentiated effort rarely recognized by automated filters
AI tools enable high-volume, low-differentiation application patterns
Market conditions drive candidate futility and exhaustion
